provenance: 5 independent adversarial agents + 1 synthesis judge (Workflow run wf_04f14941-4f8). Numbers below were computed in EPHEMERAL agent scratch probes against the committed generator; they are agent-reported findings, NOT a deterministically reproducible receipt like preflight.json. Recorded here so the spec's claims are checkable.
synthesis_verdict: needs_fixes (all four fixes have since been applied to scripts/jepa_0d_accumulator_preflight.py and re-run; the n=3000 receipt is preflight.json)

deconfound_linear.note: linear floor robust across seeds/p_noise/n; converges to ~0, never creeps to 0.10. small-MLP 0.095 was overfit noise (larger net did worse).

oracle_honest.note: event route reads only event tokens; not reading stored truth; recovery degrades correctly as redundancy drops.

metric_position_prior_neutralised.note: a TinyGPT position embedding cannot fake u_det under the per-checkpoint majority baseline.

mask_shortcut_reproduced.same_ckpt_clean_det_decoded: 0.60..1.00 (1.00 for the old PSI duplicate twin)
mask_shortcut_reproduced.note: the exact parity Phase-0 failure mode; whole-checkpoint masking removes it.

confirmed_issues_fixed.issue: same-checkpoint XOR shortcut defeats a random 50% mask (PSI duplicate row + intrinsic n_U>count_bits dependence)
confirmed_issues_fixed.fix: pinned whole-checkpoint masking; replaced _COUPLE_A with make_psi (7 distinct nonzero functionals, rank 3, no duplicate); added model-free mask-necessity gate

confirmed_issues_fixed.issue: silent nan-drop: _cv_acc returned nan when rarest class==1, dropped from u_det_max and median
confirmed_issues_fixed.fix: stratified-holdout fallback; gate-1 fails on incomplete eval; unified gate-1/gate-3 support definitions

confirmed_issues_fixed.issue: u_det metric ambiguously pinned across gates; ordinal footgun
confirmed_issues_fixed.fix: one accuracy-det formula pinned; MAE-det report-only sidecar; within-1 det rejected
make_psi auto-generates a rank-correct coupling for any count_bits

false_alarms: small-MLP-on-raw ~0.095 is overfit noise, not a leak (larger net did worse)
readout-route u_acc degradation 0.95->0.90 is expected error-correction (min codeword Hamming 4), not a bug
oracle is not self-cheating / reading stored truth
position-prior is neutralised by the per-checkpoint majority baseline
codec marginal-fairness is real (parity_encode bit-identical to _gen_computed)
